title: GLM-5.2 发布：智谱开源旗舰，支持 1M 上下文

The US government's decision was arguably the biggest PR boost for open source ever.
Perhaps this will be retaliation, and Chinese open-source models can now position themselves as freedom software.

@Zai_org
Jun 13
Intelligence should be open, accessible, and ready to build with, empowering every developer, everywhere.
GLM-5.2 is now available to all GLM Coding Plan users, including Lite, Pro, Max, and Team plans.

discovery_record.discovery_title: GLM-5.2 发布：智谱开源旗舰，支持 1M 上下文
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 智谱 AI 发布旗舰模型 GLM-5.2，面向所有 GLM Coding Plan 用户（Lite/Pro/Max/Team）。模型具备强大编码能力、可用 1M 上下文支持及长任务优势。API 和聊天机器人服务将于下周上线，模型也将于下周在 MIT 许可证下正式开源。该发布正值美国政府决策被视为开源最大 PR，中国开源模型可借此定位为自由软件。

key_excerpts.text: 智谱 AI 发布旗舰模型 GLM-5.2，面向所有 GLM Coding Plan 用户（Lite/Pro/Max/Team）。模型具备强大编码能力、可用 1M 上下文支持及长任务优势。API 和聊天机器人服务将于下周上线，模型也将于下周在 MIT 许可证下正式开源。该发布正值美国政府决策被视为开源最大 PR，中国开源模型可借此定位为自由软件。
Post Log in Sign up Post Chubby♨️ @kimmonismus The US government's decision was arguably the biggest PR boost for open source ever.
Perhaps this will be retaliation, and Chinese open-source models can now position themselves as freedom software.
ai @Zai_org Jun 13 Intelligence should be open, accessible, and ready to build with, empowering every developer, everywhere.
2 is now available to all GLM Coding Plan users, including Lite, Pro, Max, and Team plans.
ai/devpack/latest… As our new flagship model, GLM-5.

company_actions: 智谱 AI 发布旗舰模型 GLM-5.2，面向所有 GLM Coding Plan 用户（Lite/Pro/Max/Team）。模型具备强大编码能力、可用 1M 上下文支持及长任务优势。API 和聊天机器人服务将于下周上线，模型也将于下周在 MIT 许可证下正式开源。该发布正值美国政府决策被视为开源最大 PR，中国开源模型可借此定位为自由软件。
Post Log in Sign up Post Chubby♨️ @kimmonismus The US government's decision was arguably the biggest PR boost for open source ever.
